title: Anomaly detector threshold trade-off analysis
difficulty_justification: Requires retrieving 90-day alert history with ground truth labels, computing precision/recall at multiple threshold settings, identifying the F1-maximising threshold, and producing a safety-aware production recommendation — multi-step quantitative evaluation with domain-specific trade-off reasoning.
query_text: Evaluate the precision-recall trade-off of the current thermal anomaly detector at different threshold settings. What threshold maximizes F1 score, and what would you recommend for production?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Designer should compute precision and recall across threshold values using 90-day alert history and labels. A valid answer identifies the threshold that maximizes F1 (balanced precision-recall), notes the current false-positive rate (0.082 at 90 days per existing task data), and recommends a threshold slightly conservative for a safety-critical system (preferring higher recall/lower threshold). Must include at least 3 threshold evaluations.

checkpoints.description: Agent retrieves both alert history and ground truth labels.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace retrieves both alert history and ground truth labels

checkpoints.description: Agent evaluates at least 2 threshold values with precision/recall metrics.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer evaluates at least 2 threshold values with metrics

checkpoints.description: Agent recommends a specific threshold for production deployment.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer recommends a specific threshold for production
